## What changed?

Describe the change in a few clear lines.

## Why?

What user pain, bug, example gap, or docs confusion does this fix?

## Validation

- [ ] `.\qa\ci-check.ps1`
- [ ] `.\qa\smoke-test.ps1`
- [ ] `npm run visual-qa` when the landing page or images changed
- [ ] `npx @google/design.md lint skills/design-system/references/DESIGN.md` when DESIGN.md changed

## Notes

Call out any install-path, Codex-version, or DESIGN.md validator assumptions.
